title: [雜亂分享] 英文詩歌書電影 2

replies.msg:
歡迎光臨
基本上咩英文野都分享得
想學下野同增廣見聞
死gay佬

1001
https://lihkg.com/thread/150220/page/41?ref=android

想聽啲比較抒情同相對柔和同小眾/indie嘅歌可以喺依同M O S T L Y Strings依個YouTube Channel度搵
https://www.youtube.com/user/TheMostlyStrings

例子

https://youtu.be/L1LyjhJK2h4
Brother - Curves

https://youtu.be/VmMxZmerOFg
The Middle East - Deep Water

https://youtu.be/xxJhiYW5bQg
Elmore - One Man Town

佢有啲歌甚至係YouTube上唯一片源 但如果認真鍾意嘅考慮下去買碟/買歌/join spotify之類啦

想聽啲比較抒情同相對柔和同小眾/indie嘅歌可以喺依同M O S T L Y Strings依個YouTube Channel度搵
https://www.youtube.com/user/TheMostlyStrings

例子

https://youtu.be/L1LyjhJK2h4
Brother - Curves

https://youtu.be/VmMxZmerOFg
The Middle East - Deep Water

https://youtu.be/xxJhiYW5bQg
Elmore - One Man Town

佢有啲歌甚至係YouTube上唯一片源 但如果認真鍾意嘅考慮下去買碟/買歌/join spotify之類啦

另外講下英文查字資源

首先就查字典啦
啲Cambridge Dictionary 啊之類唔洗講啦
而要知一個字嘅英文definition (順帶一提係definition 唔好再讀做a音) 其實唔洗去字典網/用字典app
你去google打 'xxxxxxxxx meaning' / 'xxxxxxxxxx definition' 之類就會出晒啲解釋 (大部分字都係）又或者會浮啲urban dictionary link/ 一啲鬼佬傾英文嘅forum
假如你唔知urban dictionary 係乜，附上一條link
http://www.urbandictionary.com
乜野slangs 甚至香港用語(written in English)佢都有definition
不過佢嘅解釋由用户寫 upvote多嗰啲比較可信 自己過濾下

唔知個字點用可以google 'xxxxxx in a sentence' / 'how to use the word xxxxxx' 之類

另外好多字單睇中文解釋可能係意思一樣，甚至佢地會被指為同義詞，但其實要小心用法可能唔同。唔清楚嘅時候可以去google打 '(字1) (字2) difference' 之類

我地諗到嘅問題 都基本上如果係rational嘅/該字係常見嘅，都有人問過架啦，頭幾條link一定有解釋
冇就自己查多幾個字典(如果係好specific/pro嘅野可能會需要專科字典) 慢慢搵料

輕推

講起好多人讀錯'definition'做'defination'
其實都有好多字都廣泛性讀錯
得閒會講下 賣個關子先

另外學下IPA啦babies 如果我得閒可能會講下 不過我依啲中途而廢撚唔適合教人野
(IPA成個系統印象中有野改過架 不過勁輕微 對我地依啲普通用家冇乜影響 只係可能你細心嘅學起上黎會有confusing位)

冇學過/學唔精嘅就睇片啦 (利申 我都冇睇晒 抽左少少睇 覺得幾清晰) (好很長)
https://youtu.be/o8KppNXfx2k
https://youtu.be/G4Z5qngn-48

好似係

Do not go gentle into that good night by Dylan Thomas

Do not go gentle into that good night,
Old age should burn and rave at close of day;
Rage, rage against the dying of the light.

Though wise men at their end know dark is right,
Because their words had forked no lightning they
Do not go gentle into that good night.

Good men, the last wave by, crying how bright
Their frail deeds might have danced in a green bay,
Rage, rage against the dying of the light.

Wild men who caught and sang the sun in flight,
And learn, too late, they grieved it on its way,
Do not go gentle into that good night.

Grave men, near death, who see with blinding sight
Blind eyes could blaze like meteors and be gay,
Rage, rage against the dying of the light.

And you, my father, there on the sad height,
Curse, bless, me now with your fierce tears, I pray.
Do not go gentle into that good night.
Rage, rage against the dying of the light.
